h1: Change of Ownership – Vascular Intervention Business
h2: These products are now part of the Teleflex portfolio:
paragraphs: The BIOTRONIK Vascular Intervention business (including BIOTRONIK AG, Buelach Switzerland), has been acquired by Teleflex, effective as of July 1st, 2025.
Astron TM Carnelian TM Support Dynamic Dynamic Renal Dynetic TM -35 Fortress TM Freesolve TM Neptune TM Pad
Orsiro TM Mission TM Orsiro TM Oscar TM Pantera TM LEO Pantera TM Lux TM Pantera TM Pro Passeo TM -14 Passeo TM -18
Passeo TM -18 Lux Passeo TM -18 Lux TM Passeo TM -35 HP Passeo TM -35 Xeo TM PK Papyrus TM Pulsar TM -18 T3 Pulsar TM -35 Synsiro TM Pro
For all inquiries or support related to these products, please visit: www.teleflex.com
If you are searching for instructions for product use or technical manuals for the products listed above, you can currently still find these under: https://manuals.biotronik.com
title: Change of Ownership – Vascular Intervention Business | Biotronik
desc: The BIOTRONIK Vascular Intervention business (including BIOTRONIK AG, Buelach Switzerland), has been acquired by Teleflex, effective as of July 1st, 2025.
